_notes.note_epidemic_shared_bits: Blood Plague(55078) and Frost Fever(55095) both share mask1 bit11(2048)=0x00000800 and mask2 bit1(2). These are dropped from the Epidemic combined mask. Unique bits: BP mask1 bit25(33554432), FF mask1 bit26(67108864). Combined [0,100663296,0] targets both diseases without shared-bit false matches.
_notes.note_morbidity_split: Morbidity reduces Death Coil and Death and Decay CDs by DIFFERENT amounts. Two separate entries required: id=662 for Death Coil (-2.5s/rank) and id=663 for DnD (-5s/rank). Verify actual values in-game and adjust value_per_rank if needed.

talent_affixes.name: Epidemic
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,100663296,0]=0x06000000 in mask1. BP unique bit25(33554432)|FF unique bit26(67108864)=100663296. Shared bits dropped: mask1 bit11(2048) and mask2 bit1(2) both appear on BP and FF — excluding prevents false matches on other spells with those shared bits. Carrier BloodPlague(55078) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_DK. Blood Plague and Frost Fever duration +3s/rank (DURATION FLAT: 3000ms). WotLK: 2r at +3/+6s.

talent_affixes._todo: Unholy Command (2r, tier 2) — Reduces cooldown of Death Grip by 5/10s. COOLDOWN FLAT -5000ms/rank on DeathGrip(49576) — implementable if SPELLFAMILY_DK. Add after verifying .spellinfo all 49576.
Unholy Blight (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Impurity (5r, tier 3) — Increases attack power bonus of spells by 4/8/12/16/20%. Stat conversion (AP to spell damage), not implementable as SpellMod.
Dirge (2r, tier 3) — Scourge Strike and Obliterate generate 2.5/5 additional Runic Power. Resource generation on ability use, not implementable as SpellMod.
Magic Suppression (3r, tier 4) — Reduces all magic damage taken by 2/4/6%. Passive mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.
Corpse Explosion (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
On a Pale Horse (2r, tier 4) — Increases mounted speed and reduces duration of movement-impairing effects. Passive movement stats, not implementable as SpellMod.
Necrosis (5r, tier 5) — Auto attacks also deal 4/8/12/16/20% weapon damage as Shadow. Passive auto-attack proc, not implementable as SpellMod.
Desecration (2r, tier 5) — Plague Strike and Scourge Strike apply Desecration, reducing movement speed. Mechanic modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Wandering Plague (3r, tier 6) — Disease crits deal 33/66/100% of damage to nearby enemies. Crit proc mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Ebon Plaguebringer (3r, tier 6) — Increases crit chance of diseases and Frost/Shadow spells by 1/2/3%. Split multi-type crit buff — disease crit is a debuff modifier, not cleanly a single SpellMod.
Improved Unholy Presence (2r, tier 7) — In Unholy Presence, movement speed increased by 5/10%. Conditional presence passive, not implementable as SpellMod.
Rage of Rivendare (5r, tier 7) — Attacks deal 2/4/6/8/10% more damage to diseased targets. Conditional on target state, not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Summon Gargoyle (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
